case_title: DIRKLAND ADAMS VS. SCOOT RIDES, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 8, 2021 AT 3:30 P.M. PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-08-2021 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-08-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DIRKLAND ADAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, LLC REPRESENTED BY NICHOLAS HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SCOOT RIDES INC, SHANNA BURKHOLDER, REPRESENTATIVE FOR DEFENDANT SCOOT RIDES INC'S INSURRANCE CARRIER LLOYDS UNDERWRITERS IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCES. DEFENDANT BIRD RIDES INC IS NOT PRESENT. SHANNA BURKHOLDER, REPRESENTATIVE FOR DEFENDANT SCOOT RIDES INC. REQUEST A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW HER TIME TO TIMELY SUBMIT ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST AS WELL AS AN AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT SCOOT RIDES, INC. MS. BURKHOLDER PROVIDES THE COURT WITH HER ADDRESS INFORMATION FOR COURT NOTICES. IJS IS UPDATED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [HEARING SET FOR OCT-08-2021 AT 3:30PM]

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ADAMS, DIRKLAND AS TO DEFENDANT SCOOT RIDES, INC. SCOOT NETWORKS (ABC), LLC BIRD RIDES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS (ABC), LLC
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY OTHER BURKHOLDER, SHANNA C/O LLOYDS UNDERWRITERS INSURANCE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$53.90) SERVED MAR-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCOOT RIDES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-19-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DIRKLAND ADAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, LLC REPRESENTED BY NICHOLAS HERNANDEZ, REPRESENTATIVE, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS SCOOT RIDES, INC AND BIRD RIDES INC ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT PARTIES ARE IN THE PROCESS OF REACHING A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL IS MADE. COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION. DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, LLC MAKES A REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL DUE TO THE BELIEF THAT THEY ARE NOT THE PROPER ENTITY TO BE NAMED IN THIS MATTER. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
